span.p: Server-set session: access token in memory + refresh token in HttpOnly+Secure+SameSite cookie + CSRF defense

span.p: Access token in memory only; refresh via provider SDK; NEVER localStorage

span.p: STOP — one XSS steals every token. Move to memory + HttpOnly cookie.
